seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mungo and Mungo Brush. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mungo vs Mungo Brush: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mungo and Mungo Brush.
heading: Mungo vs Mungo Brush — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mungo, New South Wales and Mungo Brush, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mungo Brush has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Mungo (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mungo or Mungo Brush safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mungo has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Mungo Brush scores 34/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mungo scores 59/100 for bushfire risk. Mungo Brush scores 53/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mungo or Mungo Brush?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mungo Brush has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
